title: Profile an aggregation with explain
description: Run an aggregation in explain mode to see which stages used indexes and where the pipeline blocks or spills.
body: Use when an aggregation pipeline is slow and you need stage-level insight. Actions: call db.collection.aggregate(pipeline, { explain: true }) or append .explain("executionStats"), read each stage to see which used an index (the leading $match/$sort) and which are blocking ($group, $sort without an index), and look for usedDisk true signalling a spill. Reorder stages or add an index and re-profile. Verify the leading stage reports an IXSCAN and the spill flag clears. Validation signals include executionTimeMillis dropping and no stage reporting a disk spill. Risk boundary: setting allowDiskUse to mask a spill hides a memory problem, so prefer filtering earlier before enabling disk use.
